name: planpilot
description: Reusable planning workflows for PRDs, technical specs, and GitHub Issues + Projects v2 sync.

interface.shortDescription: Create PRDs, specs, and synced GitHub project plans.
interface.longDescription: planpilot provides reusable Codex skills for product planning workflows: create a PRD from an idea, turn a PRD into a technical specification, and sync structured plan artifacts to GitHub Issues and Projects v2 through the pinned planpilot CLI runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use planpilot to create PRDs, draft specs, or sync GitHub project plans.
